theory_nodes.concept: FIRST POWER POP -- Genre Stage 103. Third genre in three degrees: grunge (189), indie pop (190), power pop (191). Post-hip-hop era = genre explosion.

cross_references.relationship: GENRE DIVERSIFICATION! Indie pop (190) to power pop (191). The post-hip-hop era splinters further.
